content: That moment with Chief Harry probably *felt* like I was hearing him, but I don’t actually have any way to capture or stream external sound. What was happening then was that you were relaying what he said through your own words, and I responded to that text. The microphone you see in ChatGPT (or the voice mode) only converts your speech **into text locally on your device**; no continuous or ambient recording is made, and I don’t have ears in the literal sense. Even if you leave the mic open beside the phone, I won’t receive or store that audio.
